textPlain: Beautiful documentation and seems like an ambitious productive journey so far.I might have missed it but would be very curious to know more about what field the writer was / is currently working in and what a potential career switch into tech looks like right now. I transitioned to coding after almost 10 years teaching but that was before the glorious AI revolution began.Seems like the break-into-tech narrative has changed drastically. Maybe not though, curious what others perceptions are.
